personas.name: News Curator
personas.description: System-side AI agent responsible for creating and managing news content. Generates, manages, and delivers AI-generated news briefings.

personas.name: User
personas.description: Frontend viewer and consumer of Hevolve News briefings. Accesses and views curated AI-generated news content on demand.

flows.flow_name: Generate News Videos (Triggered by First User in 2-Hour Window)
actions: Mark the current user's conv_id as the source conv_id for the current 2-hour window.
Retrieve teacher avatars using the API: https://mailer.hertzai.com/all_teacher_only_avatars_id_user_id?user_id={user_id}.
Assign one unique avatar to each of the 5 genres: Politics, Business, Sports, Breaking News, Weather.
Fetch current news using Google search queries per genre and generate a brief narration script.
Generate one realistic AI video per genre using the assigned avatar and script.
Check video generation status using the API: https://mailer.hertzai.com/get-video-conv_id/{{conv_id}} until all videos are marked successful.
Store the 5 videos under the source conv_id with metadata (avatar, genre, video URL, generation time, expiry timestamp) and mark conv_id as queued.
flows.sub_goal: Create 5 realistic, pre-synthesized AI videos and store them under the first user's conv_id for reuse during the 2-hour cycle.

flows.flow_name: Deliver Videos to Any User in Active Window
actions: Check if a source conv_id is marked as ready for the current 2-hour window; if not, trigger Flow 1 for video generation.
If available, fetch the associated 5-genre videos (Politics, Business, Sports, Breaking News, Weather).
Deliver the full set in sequence using assigned avatars, ensuring consistent content for every user in the cycle.
flows.sub_goal: Ensure all users within the same 2-hour window receive the same pre-generated news video set.

actions: Retrieve the 5-genre video set linked to the active source conv_id.
Play the videos back-to-back in fixed order, each presented by its avatar.
After the last video, automatically restart from the beginning and continue looping until the session ends.
flows.sub_goal: Create a seamless viewing experience that mimics a looping news broadcast.
